---
title: "Microlearning"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Bite-sized 1-2 hour skill sessions"
description: "Focused 1-2 hour microlearning sessions for specific tools and technologies. Perfect for busy professionals who want to quickly learn a new skill or tool."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1><span class="gr">Micro</span>learning</h1>
    <p>Master a new tool in 1-2 hours. Focused sessions designed for busy professionals who value their time.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Tools & systems</h2>
    <p class="sub">Pick a session, show up, leave with a new skill.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>Unix Command Line</h3><p>Essential commands, navigation, and shell scripting basics. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/cli-intro/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-table"></i><h3>SC-IM Spreadsheets</h3><p>Terminal-based spreadsheets with formulas, formatting, and data import. 1 hour.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/sc-im/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-layout-split"></i><h3>Tmux</h3><p>Session management, panes, windows, and productivity shortcuts. 1 hour.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/tmux/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i><h3>Syncthing</h3><p>Private, peer-to-peer file sync setup and configuration. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/syncthing/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i><h3>Emacs Essentials</h3><p>Navigation, editing, buffers, and getting started with packages. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/emacs/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-spreadsheet"></i><h3>LibreOffice Calc</h3><p>Advanced formulas, data analysis, charts, and macros. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/libreoffice-calc/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Publishing & writing</h2>
    <p class="sub">Modern document tools for technical professionals.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-journal-code"></i><h3>Quarto Publishing</h3><p>YAML frontmatter, Markdown, code chunks, and multi-format output. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/quarto/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-list-task"></i><h3>Org-mode Fundamentals</h3><p>Note-taking, task management, agenda views, and literate programming. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/org-mode/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i><h3>LaTeX for Academic Writing</h3><p>Document structure, equations, bibliographies, and common packages. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/latex/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-5 mt-2 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-type"></i><h3>Typst Markup Language</h3><p>Modern typesetting with simple syntax, math notation, and templates. 1 hour.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/typst/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Operating systems</h2>
    <p class="sub">Hands-on introductions to security-focused OS platforms.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-snow"></i><h3>NixOS Introduction</h3><p>Declarative configuration, package management, and rollbacks. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/nixos/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-hdd-rack"></i><h3>FreeBSD Basics</h3><p>System architecture, pkg management, and ports collection. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/freebsd/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lock"></i><h3>OpenBSD Security</h3><p>Security philosophy, pledge, PF firewall, and mitigations. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/openbsd/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-5 mt-2 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>QubesOS Security Model</h3><p>Compartmentalization, domains, templates, and secure workflows. 2 hours.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning/qubesos/" class="m-lk">Session details</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">13</div><div class="m-nl">Sessions available</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">1–2h</div><div class="m-nl">Per session</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Practical</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Learn something new<br>over lunch</h2>
    <p>Perfect for lunch-and-learn sessions, team building, or personal skill upgrades.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a session</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Quick reference guides &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Cheat sheets included &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Group packages
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
